data.body: Consideration: [Reliability] Brainstorm re-invocation idempotency — if a user re-invokes brainstorm mid-session or the scrutiny pipeline triggers a Phase 1 re-run, the researcher should be dispatched at most once per unique feature context (same session), not once per Phase 1 iteration. Duplicate dispatches produce redundant CQL API calls against the Confluence rate limit. Specify whether the researcher is dispatched on every Phase 1 loop exit or only once per session via a sentinel in ARTIFACTS_DIR. (taxonomy: implicit_shared_state)
